title: win10 系統保留磁碟問題

replies.msg: 唉，安裝windows果陣冇睇清楚，將500gb做爽系統保留磁碟，同埋冇再分割磁碟，依家得個c盤，依家係咪要再重新安裝一次？

1. Create a ubuntu live boot USB
2. Use gparted
3. Might need to fix the boot records etc
4. ????
5. Profit


Why don't you simply install Linux?

1. Create a ubuntu live boot USB
2. Use gparted
3. Wipe your hdd, proceed install
4. Profit
